articles.title: Draisaitl hits 1,000 points against ex-Oiler Skinner
articles.description: Edmonton Oilers forward Leon Draisaitl became the fourth-fastest active player in NHL history to reach 1,000 career points in the first period against the Pittsburgh Penguins.

articles.title: Five days after goalie swap, Jarry bests Skinner
articles.description: Tristan Jarry and Stuart Skinner, traded for one another just five days ago, starred against their former teams as Edmonton defeated Pittsburgh 6-4 on Tuesday night.

articles.title: Leon Draisaitl’s path to being elite wasn’t always clear
articles.description: The National Hockey League has long been aware of Leon Draisaitl’s dominance and Oilers fans have long been aware of hockey lucky they are to watch #29 play on a nightly basis. That didn’t make Tuesday night in Pittsburgh any less special as the Oilers superstar became just the 103rd player in NHL history, and…
articles.author: Tyler Yaremchuk

articles.title: Long Read: How Leon Draisaitl, a kid from Cologne, Germany, became a 1,000-point scoring superstar
articles.description: Last night in Pittsburgh, Leon Draisaitl became the 21st-fastest player to score 1,000 points in NHL history. Draisaitl needed 824 games to reach the 1,000 mark — two more games than Mark Messier, and six fewer than Adam Oates to slot in between the Hall of Fame players. The list of players to reach 1,000…
articles.author: Jason Gregor

articles.title: A look at what the Oilers have in Spencer Stastney: Comparing him to Brett Kulak & his early chemistry with Ty Emberson
articles.description: Plenty of storylines emerged in the Edmonton Oilers’ 6–4 win over the Pittsburgh Penguins last night. There was a netminder duel between Stuart Skinner and Tristan Jarry, along with Leon Draisaitl recording his 1,000th NHL point. Yet, in the background, there was also a Spencer Stastney and Brett Kulak angle that flew under the radar,…
articles.author: Sean Panganiban

articles.title: ‘You didn’t deserve that’: Oilers fans react to Skinner’s Penguins debut
articles.description: It was an eventful evening in Pittsburgh as the Edmonton Oilers visited the Penguins on Tuesday, with storylines galore. Just a few days after being traded, Stuart Skinner faced his former team in his debut for Pittsburgh. Leon Draisaitl also managed to score career point 1,000 on Skinner when just last week, they were sharing…
articles.author: Woz

articles.title: The Day After 34.0: An ’emotional’ night for all, players ready to move on after Oilers, Penguins trade
articles.description: Tuesday night wasn’t easy for anyone. Tristan Jarry, Stuart Skinner and Brett Kulak had the band-aid ripped off, facing off against their former teams just days after a massive trade shook both the Edmonton Oilers and Pittsburgh Penguins. There was no shortage of storylines heading into the game: the trade, Leon Draisaitl chasing point 1,000,…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Leon Draisaitl’s 1000th point, a goodbye to Stuart Skinner, and Connor McDavid is on fire for the Oilers
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers landed in Pittsburgh for the third game of their five-game road trip, only four days after making the trade that sent Stuart Skinner and Brett Kulak to the Penguins in exchange for Tristan Jarry and Samuel Poulin. And with both goalies still wearing helmets from their former organizations, all eyes were on…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: Four point nights from Oilers’ McDavid and Draisaitl spoil Skinner’s debut with Penguins: Recap, Reaction and Highlights
articles.description: It’s always a blast when the Edmonton Oilers play the Pittsburgh Penguins. On Tuesday evening, the Oilers played the third of five games on this road trip, defeating the Penguins 6-4 to move to 16-12-6 and into the third spot in the Pacific Division. Let’s take a look at what went on in this one!…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: Oilers’ Curtis Lazar helped off the ice with apparent injury in Tuesday game against Penguins
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers are down a man against the Pittsburgh Penguins. In the second period Tuesday night, forward Curtis Lazar got tied up with Penguins defenceman Jack St. Ivany and fell into the boards, colliding with former teammate Brett Kulak in the process. Lazar then needed assistance getting off the ice, and did not return…
articles.author: Dylan Nazareth

articles.title: Leon Draisaitl becomes fifth player in franchise history to hit score 1000th point
articles.description: Leon Draisaitl has officially hit 1000 career points. The point came against Draisaitl’s former goaltender in Stuart Skinner, as the Edmonton Oilers faced off against the Pittsburgh Penguins on Tuesday night. It came early in the game and on the power play, in fitting fashion, as Draisaitl picked up a secondary assist on a Zach Hyman…
articles.author: Dylan Nazareth

articles.title: Oilersnation Radio: Oilers’ Tristan Jarry vs. Penguins’ Stuart Skinner
articles.description: It’s Tuesday afternoon, and there’s a fresh episode of Oilersnation Radio set, which means the boys were back in the studio to recap the week that was. On today’s episode, the guys discussed the Oilers’ Tuesday’s matchup vs. the Penguins, Tristan Jarry vs. Stuart Skinner, Baggedmilk’s Trivia, and much more. We kicked off the Tuesday…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: How has Tristan Jarry fit in Edmonton so far?
articles.description: Jarry has won each of his first two starts with his new team.
articles.author: Tyler Kuehl

articles.title: Where does Leon Draisaitl end up in all-time scoring?
articles.description: Draisaitl’s 1.217 points per game ranks 13th all-time.
articles.author: Ryan Cuneo

articles.title: Oilers’ Leon Draisaitl registers 1,000th career NHL point
articles.description: Draisaitl became the third-fastest active player to reach the milestone, behind only Sidney Crosby and Connor McDavid.
articles.author: Mike Gould
